author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Added solve_dyn(a: IxDyn, b: IxDyn) -> Array<T, IxDyn> as a dynamic-rank wrapper. Validates A is 2-D + square at runtime; reshapes internally and delegates to solve. No extra copy versus typed path.

solve and solve_dyn coexist as a dual API.

3 tests covering happy path, non-2D rejection, non-square rejection. Re-exported at lib.rs root. ferray-linalg: 3 new tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit b2574c99.
